titleStmt.title: SII 38.142: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 142. (A.R. No. 142 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On a fifth pillar of the verandah, round the central shrine, Ādhipurīśvara temple.

summary.p: This incomplete inscription begins with the meykīrtti of the king, Tingaḷēr taru-taṉ.

This records that a revenue official Iḻaiyūru-kiḻavaṇ Nārayaṇaṉ Vēḷ of Āraṇinilaisiṅgavarampēḍu alias Mummaḍiśōḻanallūr of Paiyyūr-kōṭṭam deposited twenty eight kāśu with the members of the sabhā (on whose behalf it was received by five members) of Maṇali alias Siṅgavishṇuch-charuppēdimaṅgalam of Puḻal-nāḍu in Puḻar-kōṭṭam (a division) in Jayaṅkoṇḍachōḷa-maṇḍalam, for conducting various rituals and worship as stated below, on the day following the tīrttham (culmination ritual) of the festival conducted with Māsi-magham, out of the interest of seventy kalam of paddy that was to accrue annually at the rate of two kalam, tuṇi and padakku per kāśu. The paddy was to be measured out by the standard measure called Arumoḻidēvan at the treasury of the temple by the above sabhaiyār. The above said interest was to meet the expenses on the oil for the sacred bath (tirunīrāṭṭu) of the god on the above cited occasion, for the food offering to the god on the same occasion, for the distribution of prasādam, for the standing lamp to be burnt at the place where the deity was stationed as also for the food offerings to the god at the time of the procession in the evening of that day and such other rituals. Provision was also made for supplying oil for the bath, and feeding of the devotees and also for the feeding of the servants viz cooks, potters, drummers, (uvachchars) and such other personnel who were to serve during the festival. Provision was also made for the routine daily bathing of the god with the scented oil and for the food offerings.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī .— tiṅkaḷer tarutaṉṟoṅkal veṇkuṭaik kiḻ ni
lava malarmakaḷ puṇarntu ceṅkoloccik karuṅkali kaṭintu maṉṉu pallūḻi U
ḷ ṭeṉnavar mūvaruḷ māṉāparaṇanponmuṭiyāṉap parumaṇi pacuntalai poru
kaḷattarintu virakeraḷaṉai Āṉaikkiṭuvittucaivil cuntarapāṇṭiyaṉait ticaikeṭa
t tollai mullaiyūrtturatti Olkalil veṇāṭṭaraicai coṇāṭotu
kki mevu pukaḻ Irāmakuṭamuvar keṭa munintu velaikeḻa kān=taḷūrccālaikalamaṟut
tāhavamallaṉu mañcakkevutal koṅkarum paṭaiyālāṅkavar ceṉaiyuḷ kaṇṭapa
yyaṉum kaṅkātiraṉum vaṇṭamarkaḷiṟṟoṭu maṭiyat tiṇṭiṟal viritaru vikkiyum vicaiyāti
ttaṉum karumuraṭ cāṅkamayaṉum mutaliṉar samīrabhīru Ottuṭai nimir cuṭarp ponnoṭa
yṅkari puraviyoṭum piṭittu taṉ nāṭaiyil jayaṅkoṇṭu Oṉṉārk koḷḷippākkai Oḷ
ḷeri maṭuttu villivarRead villavarmiṉavar veñciṉac caḷukkiyar villavar mutaliṉar vaṇaṅkaviṟ
ṟiruntu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻaṉ Uyarn=ta perumpukaḻ kovirājakeśaripanmarāna Uṭaiyār śrīrā
jātirājadevarkku yāṇṭu Irupatteḻāvatu ..jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa maṇṭalattu puḻak
koṭṭattup puḻalnāṭṭu maṇaliyāṉa ciṅkaviṣṇaccaruppetimaṅkalattu sabhaikku camain=ta
neṭuveṭpūr paṭṭayakkiramavittaṉum neṭuveṭpūrcan=tirak kiramavittaṉum neṭuveḻṭpuRead neṭuveṭpūr
r bhāskarak kiramavittaṉum paṅkaṉūrpaṭṭayakkiramavittaṉum neṭuveṭpūr Āṭavalānpaṭṭa
somājiyārumāka Ivvaiyomuḷḷiṭṭa sabhaiyom puravuvari tiṇaikkaḷattukkaṇakku (pai)
paiyyūrkoṭṭattu Āraṇinilai ciṅkavarampeṭāṉa mummaṭi coḻaṉallūr Iḷaiyuṟu kiḻavaṉ
nārāyaṇaṉ veḷtiruvoṟṟiyūruṭaiyār mācimakat tiruviḻāvil tirttammāṭiyaruḷiṉa piṟ
ṟai nāṉṟu Uṭaiyār tūṉirāṭṭu Āṭiyaruḷa vāci veṇṇaikkāppu Āḻaākkum mañcaḷ Irupalamu
m tirumañcanamāṭiyaruḷi Amutuceyya Arici patakkum prasādaṅ kuṭukkum caṭṭiccoṟṟukku Arici kuṟuṇi
yum neyyamutu Uḻakkum caṟkarai Amutu Uḻakkum paruppamutu Uriyum miḷaku Iru ceviṭum kaṭuku nāṟ
ceviṭum tayiramutu Iru nāḻiyum pala kaṟiyamutu nūṟṟuppalamum Aṭaikkāyamutukku veṟuṅkāy I
rupatum veṟṟilaikkaṭṭu Oṉṟum kaṟiyamutukku Uppu Uḻakkum Eḻun=taruḷi Irukkumiṭattu nilai viḷakku
kku Eṇṇai Uriyum Antiyampoḻutu tiruviḻāveḻun=taruḷi pukuntu tiruvamutu ceytaruḷa Amutukku A
rici Aiṅkuṟuṇiyum neyyamutu Uriyum caṟkarai Amutu Uḻakkum puḷiṅkaṟi Amutukku caṟkarai Uri
yum paruppamutu nāḻiyum miḷaku Āḻākkum kaṭuku Uḻakkum tayiramutu nāṉāḻiyum palakaṟi
niṟai Irunūṟṟup palamum kaṟiamutukku Uppu nāḻiyum Eḻun=taruḷi Irukkumiṭattu Aṭaikkāya
mutukku veṟuṅkāy Irupatum veṟṟilaik kaṭṭu Oṉṟum nilai viḷakku nālukku Eṇṇai nāḻiyu
m pattarkaḷ tiruviḻāppotta Eṇṇai muppatiṉāḻiyum pattarkaḷ caṭṭiccoṟṟukku Araci kalane tū
ṇiyum kaṟikku miḷaku Uḻakkum palakaṟi niṟai muṉṉūṟṟup palamum tayir patinaṟuṉāḻiyum caṭṭic co
ṟṟukku veṟuṅkāy Irunūṟum veṟṟilaikkaṭṭu pattum Āka nāḷoṉṟukku vācaeṇṇaik
kāppu Āḻākkukku nellu kuṟuṇiyum poṉakap paḻavarici Eḻukuṟuṇi Aiñciraṇṭu vaṇ
ṇattāl nellu kalane Aiṅkuṟuṇi nāṉāḻiyum patteṭṭu kutta larici kalane Aiṅkuṟuṇik
ku Aiñciraṇṭuvaṇṇattāl nellu mukkalane tūṇippatakku nāṉāḻiyum ney muvuḻakkiṉu
kku nellu mukkuṟuṇi Aṟu nāḻiyum caṟkarai Amutu nāḻikku nellu tūṇiyum paruppamutu mūvu
ḻakkiṉukku nellu muṉṉāḻiyum miḷaku Āḻākke Iruceviṭuṉukku nellukkuṟuṇiyum ka
ṭuku Uḻakke nāṟceviṭiṉukku nellu nāṉāḻiyum tayiramutu Aṟunāḻikku nellu kuṟuṇi nāṉā
ḻiyum palakaṟi Amutu muṉṉūṟṟuppalattukku nellutūṇippatakkum Aṭaikkāyamutukku
veṟuṅkāy nāṟpatiṉukku nellunāṉāḻiyum veṟṟilaikkaṭṭu Iraṇṭiṉukku nellu muṉṉāḻiyu
m mañcaḷ Irupalattukku nellu Irunāḻiyum puḷi Irupalattukku nellu nāḻiyum kaṟi Amutukku U
ppu nāḻi Uḻakku nellu Irunāḻi Uriyum nilaiviḷakku Eṇṇai nāḻi Urikku nellu tūṇi
patakkum pattarkaḷ tiruviḻāp potta Eṇṇai muppatiṉāḻikku nellu patiṉ kalamum pattarka
ḷ caṭṭiccoṟṟukku miḷaku Uḻakkiṉukku nellu kuṟuṇi nāṉāḻiyum pala kaṟi niṟai muṉṉūṟṟuppa
lattukku nellu tūṇipatakkum tayir patinaṟu nāḻikku nellu patakkum veṟuṅkāy Irunūṟiṉu
kku nellu mukkuṟuṇiyum veṟṟilaik kaṭṭu pattiṉukku nellu kuṟuṇi Eḻu nāḻiyum Āka nellu pati
neṇ kalamukkuṟuṇi nāṉāḻi Uriyum pattarkaḷ cālaikku Arici nāṟkalane tūṇi patakkiṉukku Aiñciraṇ
ṭu vaṇṇattāl nellu patinorukalane mukkuṟuṇiyum ney nāṉāḻikku nellu kalane tūṇiyum caṟka
rai Aiññāḻiyiṉukku nellukalane Irutūṇiyum payiṟukuṟuṇi nāṉāḻikku nellu tūṇi nāṉāḻiyum miḷa
ku nāḻiyiṉukku nellu Aiṅkuṟuṇiyum kaṟikku mañcaḷ Aimpalattukku nellu Aiññāḻiyum palakaṟi niṟai
Aiññūṟṟup palattukku nellu kalamum Uppuk kuṟuṇi Irunāḻikku nellu patakku nāṉāḻiyum tayir kalattukku
nellu Iru kalamum mor Irukalattukkum nellukalamum veṟuṅkāy Āyirattukku nellu kalane mukku
ṟuṇi Aiññāḻiyum veṟṟilaikkaṭṭu Aimpatiṉukku nellu Iru tūṇik kuṟuṇi muṉṉāḻiyum kalamiṭu kucavaṉu
kku nellu Irukalamum viṟakuiṭuvārkku nellu Irukalane tūṇi patakkum Aṭumaṭaiyārkku nellu tūṇipa
takkum paricāramāṇikaḷukku nellu tūṇipatakkum prasā[ daṅ] kuṭukkum paricaṭṭam patiṉukku poṉ
kaḻañciṉukku nellu patiṉaṟukalamum tiruppaḷḷicivikaiyārkku nellu kalamum tiruppaḷḷi toṅ
kaliṭuvārkku nellu tūṇi patakkum tiruppaḷḷittāmam paṟiccu toṭuppārkkum nellu mukkuṟuṇiyum Ukacca
rkku nellu tūṇi patakkum tiruvolakattukku Eṇṇai Irupatiṉāḻikku nellu Aṟukalane Irutūṇiyum
Āka nellu Aimpattoru kalane mukkuṟuṇi Aiññāḻiyum Āka nāḷoṉṟukku nellu Aṟupattoṉpatiṉ
kalane mukkuṟuṇi Oru nāḻi Urikkum maṇaliyāṉaciṅkaviṣṇu caruppetimaṅkalattu cavaiyom koṇṭa
kācu Irupatteṭṭiṉukku kācu Oṉṟiṉukku Arumoḻitevaṉāl nellu Irukalane tūṇi patakkāka van=ta ne
llu Eḻupatinkalamum Innellueḻupatinkalamum Āṇṭāṇṭu toṟum poliyūṭṭāka Ācantrikālamum te
var paṇṭāratte Aḷappomāṉom maṇaliyāṉa ciṅkaviṣṇuc caruppeti maThere is a stroke over ‘ma’ like mī, which may be iṅnored.ṅkalattuContinuation lost.
Digital edition of SII 38.142 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
